terms.notes: Canonical customer-facing label for the Invoice entity.
Module header for invoice listing; plural form of Invoice.
Posted/paid invoice state; must stay glossary-consistent across modules.
Unpublished/unsubmitted document state; shared across entities.
Stock or commitment allocation area; distinct from generic assignment.

terms.en: Allocated quantity exceeds available stock for this line.
terms.notes: Invariant error when stock allocation exceeds availability. Afenda uses line-level phrasing.
Payment settlement area. Afenda uses 'Settlement' not 'Payment' to distinguish from payment instruments.
Awaiting settlement processing; Afenda adds 'settlement' qualifier for clarity.
Completed settlement; Afenda uses 'Settled' not 'Reconciled'.
Main ERP dashboard title; Afenda adds 'ERP' prefix for context.
Afenda uses 'Inventory' not Frappe's 'Stock'.
Afenda uses 'Sales' not Frappe's 'Selling'.
Afenda uses 'Customers' not Odoo's 'Contacts'.
Afenda uses 'Finance' not Frappe's 'Accounts' or Odoo's 'Invoicing'.
Shared across Frappe and Odoo; Afenda retains 'Employees'.
Afenda uses 'Reports' not Odoo's 'Reporting'.
Afenda uses 'ERP Login' as branded login title, distinct from generic 'Login' or 'Log in'.
Afenda uses 'Inventory Management' as full page title; Frappe uses 'Stock', Odoo uses 'Inventory'.
Afenda uses 'Sales Management' as full page title; Frappe uses 'Selling', Odoo uses 'Sales'.
Afenda uses 'Financial Management'; Frappe uses 'Accounting', Odoo uses 'Invoicing'.
Afenda uses 'Employee Management'; Frappe uses 'Human Resources', Odoo uses 'Employees'.
Afenda uses 'System Settings'; both Frappe and Odoo use 'Settings'.
Deterministic ERP context: tenant, legal entity, accounting period, reporting currency; contracts in @afenda/core/truth.
Integrity or invariant signal in shell UI; not generic notifications. Maps to TruthAlertItem in @afenda/core/truth-ui.
Concrete fix path for a truth issue: key, type auto|manual|assisted, optional actionPath; doctrine-stable in @afenda/core/truth.
Aggregated health metric (0–100) from TruthHealthSummary; shown in user menu truth status section.
